[{"id":1556,"date":"2024-03-06T19:56:11","date_gmt":"2024-03-07T00:56:11","guid":{"rendered":"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/?p=1556"},"modified":"2025-02-26T01:41:00","modified_gmt":"2025-02-26T01:41:00","slug":"announcing-clients-reports","status":"publish","type":"post","link":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/announcing-clients-reports\/","title":{"rendered":"Reports: Save Time Updating Clients"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>We&#8217;re thrilled to announce an exciting new addition to your OurGov toolkit\u2014Reports! <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Reports are designed to streamline your workflow and how you share updates with your clients by automating the work you do updating a spreadsheet and sending it out each week.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-1-1024x836.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1563\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>Why Custom Reports?<\/strong><\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>When we first started OurGov, one of the <em><strong>most <\/strong><\/em>requested features was the ability to create nice tracking reports.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Client relationships are unique, and we understand the importance of tailoring your communication to each client&#8217;s specific needs. With Custom Reports, you now have the flexibility to curate personalized updates that matter most to your clients.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>Key Features<\/strong><\/h2>\n\n\n\n<ol class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li><strong>Customizable<\/strong><br>The content you send to clients is your own. Choose column layout, sort order, and customize which bills show in each report.<br><\/li>\n\n\n\n<li><strong>Effortless Note Integration<\/strong><br>Add personalized notes to your reports, providing valuable context and insights that enhance your client&#8217;s understanding. <br><br>You can even add notes besides each bill to provide an update.<br><\/li>\n\n\n\n<li><strong>Time-Saving Efficiency<\/strong><br>You may often go to the <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/legislations\">Legislations<\/a> page and apply the same filters: <em>Senate bills currently in the Committee<\/em> <em>on Health<\/em>. Reports can bypass the need to select even one filter on the legislation page by allowing you to save that search. <br><br>Each morning you can simply select your &#8220;<em>Senate Health Bills<\/em>&#8221; report and take action as you see fit.<\/li>\n<\/ol>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>How It Works<\/strong><\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Creating a Custom Report is a breeze:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ol class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li><strong>Select Your Metrics:<\/strong> Choose from a comprehensive range of metrics and data points to include in your report.<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li><strong>Personalize with Notes:<\/strong> Embed your insights directly within the report, offering clients a deeper understanding of the presented information.<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li><strong>Generate and Share:<\/strong> With a click, your custom report is ready to be shared. Seamlessly distribute it to clients through our user-friendly options.<\/li>\n<\/ol>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>Get Started Today<\/strong><\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>We believe that Custom Reports will not only save you time but also elevate your client relationships. Dive into this feature today and experience a more personalized, efficient, and client-focused reporting process.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Reports are just one of the many ways we&#8217;re committed to enhancing your experience with <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\">OurGov<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/reports\">Check it out here.<\/a><\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Good luck!<\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>OurGov now supports custom reports. Public Hearings"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-1024x571.png\" alt=\"OurGov public hearings shows details testimony delivered at hearings.\" class=\"wp-image-1537\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>When people ask &#8220;what we do&#8221;, we often answer by saying that we offer three value propositions to our customers:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ol class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li>We create workflow tools, as examples, our <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/managing-tasks-in-ourgov\/\">task management<\/a>, <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/import-your-lobbying-hours\/\">hours logging<\/a>, and <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/send-surveys-to-your-clients\/\">surveying<\/a> modules<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Aggregate\/collate data from different sources and state agencies (Legislature, Ethics Commission, Campaign Finance, etc.)<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Analyze data and provide insights<\/li>\n<\/ol>\n\n\n\n<p>Aggregation may seem trivial, but for anyone who has spent significant time navigating across different state agencies to find related information can attest to, it&#8217;s important.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Aggregating &amp; Summarizing Hearing Testimonies<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Today&#8217;s enhancement relates to the second and third proposition on the list, aggregation &amp; analyzing. We&#8217;re proud to announce we now display public hearings data throughout the site. Example: <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/committees\/hearings\/us\/wi\/assembly\/committee-on-education\/2023\/2023-09-28-0901am\">OurGov &#8211; Assembly Committee on Education 9\/28 Hearing<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-2-1024x854.png\" alt=\"OurGov School District of Milton public hearing testimony.\" class=\"wp-image-1549\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>This is a valuable time saving component of our application, as many readers can attest to the difficult task of gaining understanding hearing activity. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Prior to today, there were a few ways to obtain this understanding:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li>You can attend the hearing in person<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>You can reach out to the <a href=\"https:\/\/legis.wisconsin.gov\/lc\/\">Wisconsin Legislative Council<\/a> or search through their archives<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Or, if you&#8217;re a <a href=\"https:\/\/wiseye.org\/\">WisEye<\/a> subscriber, you can watch the hearings online<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n<p>We aim to change all of that by sharing more widely access to testimonies during committee hearings, and soon, applying powerful algorithms to identify hearing participants and A.I. to summarize depositions.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Beginning this week, hearing data will show on Legislation and Committee Hearing pages. In a few weeks, <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/artificial-intelligence-introducing-nova\/\">Nova, yours and OurGov&#8217;s, A.I. assistant<\/a> will begin to catalog and summarize testimonies, which will be available online and via email.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>All of which will be shared, automatically, with OurGov Premium subscribers based on their stated interests and subscriptions.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>Public hearings are now available in OurGov. Nova: Your A.I. Powered Policy Assistant"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>Recent enhancements in Artificial Intelligence have enabled companies like ours to create valuable tools, like Nova, our new A.I. powered assistant. Novas first impact on the site has been generating <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/introducing-intelligent-summaries\/\">policy summaries for each and every legislator, committee, and lobbying principal<\/a>, based on their legislative activity. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>With an update this week, Nova is now available directly to OurGov Premium subscribers. Nova&#8217;s first impact on the site will be the ability to summarize the differences between legislative proposals. Nova allows users to efficiently compare different versions of bills and access succinct summaries highlighting the key changes. Our aim is to simplify the often daunting task of comprehending legislative alterations, enabling you to save significant time and resources in the process.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>By utilizing advanced AI algorithms, we ensure that OurGov Premium subscribers have access to a comprehensive suite of tools tailored to optimize their legislative analysis workflow. Whether it&#8217;s delving into policy implications or tracking the latest amendments, our platform continues to provide a seamless and efficient experience, making legislative analysis more accessible and user-friendly than ever before.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-full\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/OurGov-Nova.gif\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1542\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>In addition to our existing AI-driven capabilities, such as <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/introducing-intelligent-summaries\/\">legislator, committee, and lobbying principal policy summaries<\/a>, we are excited to introduce A.I. powered insights to our <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/introducing-related-bills\/\">legislation comparison tool<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Upcoming Roadmap<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>We&#8217;ll be bringing Nova&#8217;s artificial intelligence contributions to:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li>your email updates<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>your home feed<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>creating drive in agendas,<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>creating legislative reports<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>and dialog opportunities in the context of a bill, where you can ask for more information<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n<p>OurGov subscribers can reap the benefit OurGov&#8217;s AI-driven tools today and experience a smarter, more streamlined approach to navigating the intricacies of legislative analysis. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Try it out <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/legislations\/compare\">here<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>Introducing your new policy assistant, Nova, who will begin to appear across the site over the next few months. District Maps"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>Amongst voters, legislators and other elected officials, there&#8217;s a growing interest in understanding the Wisconsin&#8217;s <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/wisconsin-school-district-maps\/\">district maps<\/a>. As these maps take center stage amid a pending Wisconsin Supreme Court case, we find ourselves fielding a growing number of requests for district maps on the site. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>These maps are often overlooked in everyday life, but, as of these last few months, have been the focus of much media and judicial campaigning. In this blog, we explore why Wisconsin&#8217;s district maps are vital for fair elections.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Why Share Wisconsin&#8217;s District Maps?<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Transparency and Understanding<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>District maps are important for ensuring transparency in the political process. They provide citizens with a clear picture of how the state&#8217;s political boundaries are drawn. By sharing these maps, we empower individuals to better understand the geographical layout of their districts and the representation they receive.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Election Participation<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Access to district maps is vital for those who wish to actively engage in the democratic process. Knowing your district allows you to participate more effectively in local elections, understand the issues affecting your area, and make informed decisions at the ballot box.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h4 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Assembly<\/h4>\n\n\n\n<p>There are 99 Assembly districts in Wisconsin, and 33 Senate districts. Each Senate district encompasses 3 Assembly districts.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<div class=\"wp-block-file\" style=\"height:900px;\"><object class=\"wp-block-file__embed\" 33<\/a><\/td><\/tr><\/tbody><\/table><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">The Pending Supreme Court Case<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>The day after progressive justices outnumbered conservatives on Wisconsin&#8217;s Supreme Court, <a href=\"https:\/\/www.wpr.org\/lawsuit-seeks-overturn-wisconsins-republican-drawn-legislative-maps-redistricting\">a lawsuit was filed<\/a> to redraw the district maps (last drawn in 2021). <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>That Supreme Court case is pending, and its outcome could potentially lead to revisions in these boundaries. Keeping an eye on this case and staying informed about any updates is essential for those who want to remain engaged in Wisconsin&#8217;s political landscape.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>As the controversy surrounding the district maps continues to unfold, our aim is to provide you with easy access to these maps for your reference and use. We believe that sharing this valuable resource empowers citizens and encourages active participation in the democratic process.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p>Feel free to explore the district maps of Wisconsin, and stay tuned for any potential changes in the future. Tracking: Do you have the votes?"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>We&#8217;re thrilled to introduce a &#8220;vote tracking&#8221; module to our site. This tool removes <em>yet another<\/em> spreadsheet from your tools and brings it into <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Our new Vote Tracking feature offers an at-a-glance view allowing you to gauge potential outcomes of a floor vote well before it occurs. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-5-1024x516.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1509\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">Rep. Neylon leans Yea on this issue. Easily remind yourself to follow up with him in coming days, weeks, or months.<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>This tool empowers lobbyists and legislators alike to easily create tasks to follow up with a legislator, ensuring timely engagement with key stakeholders. As legislation is put up for a vote, OurGov allows you to feel confident with the outcome of any given voting session and communicate to your clients the expected outcome ahead of the vote.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Why Proactive Vote Tracking Matters<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>For Legislators<\/strong><\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>For legislators introducing impactful bills, knowing where colleagues stand is imperative. This module empowers you to anticipate support, enabling you to forge alliances, address concerns, and pave the way for a seamless floor vote. By engaging with colleagues early on, you can ensure a more informed and collaborative legislative process.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\"><strong>For Lobbyists<\/strong><\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Lobbyists advocating for change understand the value of timing and precision. With our vote tracking module, you can identify potential swing votes and undecided legislators, allowing you to engage proactively and tailor your outreach. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>By creating follow-up tasks, you&#8217;ll stay on top of critical conversations, ensuring your advocacy efforts are both impactful and timely.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Using the Vote Tracking Module to Your Advantage<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Imagine a legislative landscape where you have a bird&#8217;s-eye view of potential support for your cause. This new feature paints that picture, enabling you to strategize and engage with the legislators most likely on the fence, <em>and <\/em>have a solid understanding of where each legislator stands. This is the information needed for legislative success.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>To learn more about how our Vote Tracking feature can revolutionize your approach to advocacy, connect with our dedicated support team.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>For other recent enhancements, like our new <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/bipartisanship-rating-system\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">bipartisanship Bipartisanship Rating System"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>Collaborating across party lines is crucial for driving impactful policy changes. At <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>, we&#8217;re excited to introduce our latest feature\u2014a <strong><em>bipartisanship rating<\/em><\/strong> for all legislators. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>This innovative metric provides users with a quantitative measure of legislators&#8217; ability to bridge the political divide, offering valuable insights for lobbyists, trade associations, and even legislators.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image aligncenter size-full is-resized\"><img loading=\"lazy\" decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_image.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1488\" width=\"264\" height=\"304\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">Rep. Steffen has a score of ~66%.<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Understanding the Bipartisanship Rating <\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Our rating system is a powerful yet easily understood metric that represents how frequently a legislator&#8217;s sponsored bills receive support from members of opposing parties. The score is calculated by analyzing the number of bills co-sponsored by legislators from <em>different<\/em> parties against the total bills they&#8217;ve authored\/sponsored. For example, if a <em><strong>Republican<\/strong><\/em> legislator has introduced 10 bills and 3 of those bills have garnered <em><strong>Democratic<\/strong><\/em> co-sponsorship, their Bipartisanship Rating would be <strong>30%<\/strong>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-full\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_image-2.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1497\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Why is understanding bipartisanship valuable?<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Strategic Advocacy<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>For lobbyists and trade associations, tailoring advocacy strategies to a legislator&#8217;s collaborative tendencies is a strategic move. A higher bipartisanship rating might indicate a receptiveness to constructive dialogue, guiding advocacy professionals to engage with lawmakers who are more likely to consider a range of perspectives.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Targeted Coalitions<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Identifying potential allies across party lines is a key objective for legislators seeking to advance their bills. Our Bipartisanship Rating system helps lawmakers pinpoint colleagues who are <em>open to collaboration<\/em>, enabling them to build effective coalitions that can drive legislative success.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Informed Decision-Making<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Armed with the Bipartisanship Score, legislators can make more informed decisions about bill sponsorships and co-sponsorships. By aligning their efforts with bipartisan priorities, lawmakers can effectively navigate the legislative landscape and maximize their impact.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Transparent Representation<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Transparency is a cornerstone of effective representation. A higher Bipartisanship Rating can serve as evidence of a legislator&#8217;s commitment to working across party lines for the betterment of their constituents. This feature empowers lawmakers to <strong>showcase their dedication to collaborative policymaking<\/strong>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Measuring Influence<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>The rating system isn&#8217;t just about collaboration\u2014it&#8217;s also a proxy of legislative effectiveness. It offers clients a quantitative way to gauge their engagement strategies and assess their impact on legislators&#8217; decisions.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Putting Insights into Action<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>We hope our Bipartisanship Rating system equips you with a clear and objective metric for assessing a legislator&#8217;s willingness to collaborate with other parties. It&#8217;s a tool that empowers government affairs professionals, trade associations, and legislators alike to make strategic decisions, foster cross-party partnerships, and champion meaningful change.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p>We&#8217;re committed to providing tools that empower you to navigate the complex world of government affairs with confidence, and our Bipartisanship Rating system is just <em>one more way <\/em>we&#8217;re advancing transparency, collaboration, and effective advocacy.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>To learn more about the Bipartisanship Rating system and how it can enhance your legislative efforts, visit our documentation page or <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/contact-us\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">reach out<\/a> to our dedicated support team.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Discover the power of collaboration metrics with OurGov&#8217;s Bipartisanship Rating and elevate your advocacy to new heights.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Sincerely,<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>The OurGov Team<\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>OurGov&#8217;s bipartisanship rating system scores legislators based on File Time Reports with the Ethics Commission"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>Congratulations finishing the first 6-month period of the 2023-2024 biennium. July marks a month of much needed vacations &#x2600;&#xfe0f;&#x1f3d6;&#xfe0f;, and the important act of filing your time spent lobbying with the Ethics Commission (due July 31).<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>If you&#8217;ve been <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-lobbying-teams\/tracking-your-hours\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">logging time in OurGov<\/a>, importing your time is a breeze:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-full\"><img loading=\"lazy\" decoding=\"async\" width=\"1682\" height=\"1210\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/OurGov-Hours-Plugin-e2e.gif\" alt=\"OurGov Hours Importing plugin\" class=\"wp-image-1480\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>In addition to easy importation of time into the Lobbying site, logging time in OurGov offers a number of other advantages:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-1024x545.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1481\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<ol class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li>Log for more than one principal at a time (so you don&#8217;t need to document the same meeting with legislators for each principal you represent)<br><\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Use quick buttons to capture the amount of time to log, so you never have to move your hand from the mouse.<\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Comments are defaulted into the time log entry, so you know what each entry represents, and helps to identify what you forgot to log.<\/li>\n<\/ol>\n\n\n\n<p>You can read more about time logging in OurGov on our <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-lobbying-teams\/tracking-your-hours\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Documentation site<\/a>, or take a look at these blog posts:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li><a 26T01:41:00","slug":"tracking-your-communication-using-ourgovs-crm","status":"publish","type":"post","link":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/tracking-your-communication-using-ourgovs-crm\/","title":{"rendered":"Tracking Your Communication Using OurGov&#8217;s CRM"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>We are proud to offer a comprehensive suite of tools to simplify and streamline your government affairs operations. Some features undoubtably take the spotlight over others, but today we&#8217;d like to highlight one less-recognized gem that deserves more recognition\u2014our <a href=\"https:\/\/en.wikipedia.org\/wiki\/Customer_relationship_management\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">customer relationship management<\/a> (CRM) functionality. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>This module empowers you to track communications with legislators, staffers, or clients, all within the familiar confines of <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>. Today, we shed light on this valuable feature:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-10-1024x601.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1474\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">Adding a call with Representative <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/representatives\/us\/wi\/samba-baldeh\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Samba Baldeh<\/a> &amp; his staffer, <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/staffers\/us\/wi\/samba-baldeh\/michael-lindvall\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Michael Lindvall<\/a>.<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>OurGov&#8217;s CRM functionality serves as a means for managing and documenting your interactions with legislators, staffers, and clients. Building this into OurGov eliminates the need for external software licenses and reduces the complexities associated with juggling multiple tools like Salesforce or HubSpot.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Use Cases<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Let&#8217;s delve into the benefits of this often-understated feature by exploring two practical use cases that demonstrate its value:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Building Coalitions<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>Imagine you&#8217;re tasked with building support for <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/legislations\/us\/wi\/2023\/regular\/ab19\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Assembly Bill 19<\/a>. Our powerful analytics can suggest other representatives likely to support a bill given the current sponsors. Once you have your list of prospective sponsors, our CRM tool becomes your trusted ally in reaching out to each of the likely legislators. The <em>Add Communication<\/em> button allows you to effortlessly log and track your calls, meetings, and emails with legislators and their staff members. This ensures that you and your coworkers have a comprehensive record of your interactions and carry on your advocacy efforts with continuity.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Strengthening Client Engagement and Collaboration<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>For government affairs professionals <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/use-ourgov-with-clients\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">managing multiple clients<\/a>, effective communication and collaboration are paramount. With our CRM tool, you can effortlessly organize and categorize your client communications. By tracking emails, <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/send-surveys-to-your-clients\/\">surveys<\/a> and calls to documenting key discussions, CRM empowers you to stay on top of your client interactions. This approach enhances collaboration by ensuring everyone has access to the latest information. It also facilitates seamless handoffs and provides a unified view of your relationships.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Future Plans<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>We have plans to further enhance the CRM module&#8217;s capabilities in the future. We aim to integrate our call tracking system with our <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/log-your-hours-in-ourgov\/\">hours logging<\/a> feature. With this integration, documenting a call with a legislator will automatically capture time spent on calls as direct engagement time.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>We also hope to integrate scheduled calls with popular calendar systems like <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/monitor-public-hearings\/\">Google Calendar<\/a> or Microsoft Outlook. Scheduling a call in OurGov will also place it on your calendar (and potentially, visa versa).<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p>At <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>, we recognize that true innovation lies in providing practical solutions that seamlessly fit into your existing workflow. Our CRM tool is not designed to be flashy. Consider it a reliable workhorse that helps you stay organized, foster collaboration, and quickly recall previous communications.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Unleash the power of seamless communication and elevate your government affairs efforts by using our CRM features. <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Sign up today<\/a> to experience the hidden potential within your reach.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>To learn more about the CRM tool and its features, <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/contact-us\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">reach out to us for a demo<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Stay tuned for more updates and announcements as we continue to enhance the OurGov experience for you.<\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>Our CRM tool is a subtle &#038; efficient way to track communications. management","slug":"customer-relationship-management","taxonomy":"post_tag","_links":{"self":[{"href":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/tags\/283","targetHints":{"allow":["GET"]}}],"collection":[{"href":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/tags"}],"about":[{"href":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/taxonomies\/post_tag"}],"wp:post_type":[{"href":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/posts?tags=283"}],"curies":[{"name":"wp","href":"https:\/\/api.w.org\/{rel}","templated":true}]}}]]}},{"id":1425,"date":"2023-06-08T14:31:15","date_gmt":"2023-06-08T19:31:15","guid":{"rendered":"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/?p=1425"},"modified":"2025-02-26T01:41:00","modified_gmt":"2025-02-26T01:41:00","slug":"introducing-intelligent-summaries","status":"publish","type":"post","link":"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/introducing-intelligent-summaries\/","title":{"rendered":"OurGov AI: Introducing Intelligent Summaries"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_Intelligent-Summaries-Cropped-1024x700.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1428\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>We&#8217;re excited to introduce a significant advancement to the realm of government advocacy \u2013 intelligent legislative summaries. OurGov is leveraging <a href=\"https:\/\/www.nvidia.com\/en-us\/glossary\/data-science\/generative-ai\/#:~:text=Generative%20AI%20models%20use%20neural,semi%2Dsupervised%20learning%20for%20training.\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">generative artificial intelligence<\/a> (AI) systems to provide comprehensive summaries of legislators and lobbying principals. These summaries offer unique insights into each entity&#8217;s legislative priorities &amp; interests.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-pullquote has-small-font-size\" style=\"border-radius:0px;font-style:normal;font-weight:600\"><blockquote><p>By distilling complex data into concise summaries, <br>our intelligent legislative summaries save you valuable time and effort.<\/p><\/blockquote><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>Understanding how to build a coalition is a fundamental pillar of successful advocacy. By distilling complex data into concise summaries, our intelligent legislative summaries save you valuable time and effort. Delving into committee memberships, bill sponsorships, and voting patterns, these summaries unveil a legislator&#8217;s key priorities and areas of expertise. This knowledge empowers you to tailor your advocacy strategies, forge stronger alliances, and achieve your desired outcomes.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Intelligent summaries also shed light on the interests of <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/lobbying\/principals\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">advocacy groups<\/a>. By analyzing their registered positions, our system generates summaries that highlight their core concerns and priorities. This information equips you with the insights needed to establish the right connections so as to meet your clients&#8217; needs.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">For Government Advocates<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-8-1024x296.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1462\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">OurGov leverages position and sponsorship data to generate intelligent summaries.<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>These summaries provide a comprehensive overview of legislators&#8217; stances on crucial issues. Armed with this knowledge, you can develop informed strategies, identify potential allies, and craft persuasive messaging tailored to resonate with specific lawmakers. By leveraging these insights, you can more effectively shape policy and drive legislative change.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">For Legislative Offices<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-9-1024x444.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1464\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">Senator Ballweg&#8217;s A.I. generated summary, backed by <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a> data<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>For legislators and staffers, OurGov&#8217;s intelligent summaries serve as a valuable resource for understanding your colleagues&#8217; positions and priorities. Whether seeking support for a bill or aiming for collaboration on common goals, these insights facilitate productive discussions and foster a more collaborative legislative environment.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p>It is important to recognize that these intelligent legislative summaries are powered by advanced artificial intelligence systems. While the technological advancements are remarkable, the value lies in the practical benefits they offer. <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>&#8216;s commitment is to provide you with powerful and user-friendly tools that enhance your advocacy efforts, regardless of the underlying technology.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>To learn more about this valuable feature, visit our <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">documentation site<\/a> or <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/contact\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">reach out to our team<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Together, let&#8217;s embrace the potential of intelligent insights and drive positive change through informed advocacy. <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Sign up for a free trial of OurGov today<\/a> and start increasing your impact on key issues.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Visit <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/blog\/\">our blog<\/a> to discover more about the benefits of OurGov and our role in enhancing your legislative impact on society.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Thank you for choosing OurGov as your trusted partner in shaping a better future.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Sincerely,<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>The OurGov Team<\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>We&#8217;re excited to introduce artificial intelligence to OurGov. We Love About Wisconsin"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_eagle-river-chain-of-lakes-sunset-aerial-1024x575.jpg\" alt=\"OurGov Loves Wisconsin\" class=\"wp-image-1437\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\"><em>Wisconsin&#8217;s Northwoods lakes. Eagle River, WI<\/em><\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Embracing the Charm of Wisconsin<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>We can&#8217;t help but gush about the reasons why we adore Wisconsin. From its stunning lakes to its vibrant culture and mouthwatering food, this state has captured our hearts and become an integral part of <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/about\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">our company&#8217;s story<\/a>. Join us as we dive into the specific aspects that make Wisconsin so special and unique.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Lakes Galore<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<p>One of the first things that stole our hearts about Wisconsin is its abundant lakes. In Madison, we find solace in sipping our morning coffee while overlooking the serene <a href=\"https:\/\/dnr.wi.gov\/lakes\/lakepages\/LakeDetail.aspx?wbic=804600\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Lake Monona<\/a>. And oh, the joy of setting sail on Mendota, Monona and Wingra using our family pass at <a href=\"https:\/\/www.madisonboats.com\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Brittingham Boats<\/a>! Wisconsin&#8217;s lakes offer endless opportunities for relaxation, exploration, and creating lasting memories.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Arts &amp; Rustic Charm<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image aligncenter size-large is-resized me-2\"><img loading=\"lazy\" decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-2-1024x683.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1442\" width=\"512\" height=\"342\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\"><em>Be sure to bring your own lawn chair when experiencing the intimate atmosphere of Sh*tty Barn. Spring Green, WI<\/em><\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>Wisconsin&#8217;s culture is a tapestry that beautifully weaves together rustic charm and artistic expression. In Spring Green, a small town with big character, we&#8217;ve found ourselves tapping our feet to acoustic live music at the unique <a href=\"https:\/\/shittybarnsessions.com\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Sh*tty Barn<\/a>. For a touch of the classics, the <a href=\"https:\/\/americanplayers.org\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">American Players Theater<\/a> presents enchanting Shakespearean plays that transport us to a different era. And let&#8217;s not forget the <a href=\"https:\/\/www.doorcounty.com\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">picturesque Door County<\/a>, which we think of as a fusion of Sonoma wine country and Upper Peninsula nature, beckons us to wander through cherry orchards and indulge in bocce ball, or wander through the shores of <a href=\"https:\/\/peninsulastatepark.org\/?gclid=Cj0KCQjw7PCjBhDwARIsANo7Cgn7pKpBoOE385EqORnQt4UdD75LGf2rjE5IutemEbR3phOVLKDIYuUaAl7AEALw_wcB\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Peninsula State Park<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Food, Drink, &amp; Cheese, oh my!<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-3-1024x674.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1445\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>Wisconsin proudly boasts a strong food culture, and we can&#8217;t help but join in the gastronomic celebration:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li>Bite into a delectable <a href=\"https:\/\/www.ohdanishbakery.com\/everyday-kringle-favorites?utm_source=google&amp;utm_medium=cpc&amp;utm_campaign=6657369328&amp;gad=1&amp;gclid=Cj0KCQjw7PCjBhDwARIsANo7CgnnE7JKsZYlLmO9AhcvtjMIeXb2DxEU9FR03Irl8mq2rJB3M8l6uNkaAtpvEALw_wcB\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">kringle pastry<\/a>, a Racine, Wisconsin specialty that oozes with flaky goodness. <\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>Our taste buds rejoice at the mention of <a href=\"https:\/\/colectivocoffee.com\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Colectivo Coffee<\/a>, a Milwaukee gem on the shores of Lake Michigan that brews up some of the most memorable cups of joe. <\/li>\n\n\n\n<li>And how could we forget the iconic cheese curds from every other restaurateur or mouthwatering burgers from Culver&#8217;s? <\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n<p>Wisconsin&#8217;s culinary traditions truly know how to satisfy our cravings and leave us wanting more.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Activities &amp; Festivals Galore <\/h3>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-1024x538.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1440\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\"><em>Summer<\/em> <em>Wednesdays in Madison: Concerts on the Square<\/em><\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>In Wisconsin, leisure is a way of life. We eagerly anticipate Wednesdays in Madison when the <a href=\"https:\/\/wcoconcerts.org\/concerts-tickets\/concerts-on-the-square\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Chamber Orchestra graces the square<\/a>, inviting us to bask in the melodies while we relax on blankets, savoring wine and the company of friends. <a href=\"https:\/\/www.summerfest.com\/?gad=1&amp;gclid=Cj0KCQjw7PCjBhDwARIsANo7CgnQe8509lNmrSrRKNQg9RXTe-70mK3l5R3A0Z-lpidTq5NbkTQB7lUaArd4EALw_wcB\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Summerfest in Milwaukee<\/a> is a legendary extravaganza, drawing music enthusiasts from far and wide. And for those seeking a unique adventure, <a href=\"https:\/\/www.csacoalition.org\/bike-the-barns\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Bike the Barns<\/a> takes us on a 50-mile journey, with barns serving as pit stops for delightful food and refreshing breaks. Meanwhile, <a href=\"https:\/\/www.uwec.edu\/centers\/chalkfest\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">ChalkFest in Eau Claire<\/a> presents a whimsical display of artistry and community spirit, exemplifying the distinct charm of Wisconsin&#8217;s festivals.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<h3 class=\"wp-block-heading\">Nature Is Always Close By<\/h3>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-full\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_image-6.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1454\"\/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">Fall at <a href=\"https:\/\/www.google.com\/maps\/place\/Star+Lake,+WI+54561\/@46.0250873,-89.4997526,14z\/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x4d55ce1507030bb9:0xf2688ba6b8a2c7f3!8m2!3d46.0382844!4d-89.4723647!16s%2Fm%2F07kdm0x?entry=ttu\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Star Lake<\/a>, near Plum Lake Hemlock Forest<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>The untouched beauty of Wisconsin&#8217;s nature captivates us, and nowhere is this more evident than in the paper bark birch trees gracing the up north woods or the stunning bluffs and hills in <a href=\"https:\/\/driftlesswisconsin.com\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Wisconsin&#8217;s driftless region<\/a> (not to mention world-famous <a href=\"https:\/\/dnr.wisconsin.gov\/topic\/parks\/devilslake\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Devil&#8217;s Lake<\/a>). Escaping to a cozy cabin nestled in the northern woods, whether for a tranquil winter week or a peaceful summer weekend, offers us a respite from the hectic pace of life. The sense of calm and connection with nature in northern Wisconsin is unmatched, making it a haven for those seeking solace and rejuvenation.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image alignleft size-full is-resized\"><img loading=\"lazy\" decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_image-7.png\" alt=\"\" class=\"wp-image-1458\" width=\"183\" height=\"183\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Wisconsin, with its picturesque lakes, vibrant culture, tantalizing food, lively festivals, and serene natural landscapes, has won over our hearts. From sipping coffee by Lake Monona to immersing ourselves in the arts of Spring Green and reveling in the state&#8217;s delicious culinary delights, every experience here feels like a warm embrace. We hope sharing some of our experiences in the state has warmed your heart and brightened your day.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>In closing, we leave you with a Wisconsin haiku:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-pullquote has-medium-font-size\" style=\"font-style:normal;font-weight:700\"><blockquote><p>Lake&#8217;s gentle embrace, <br>Wisconsin&#8217;s charm fills the air, <br>My heart finds its home.<\/p><cite>Taylor W.<\/cite><\/blockquote><\/figure>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>As everyone gears up for a July break in legislative activity, Related Bills Across Bienniums!"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/image-4-1024x597.png\" alt=\"OurGov improves over FiscalNote, The Wheeler Report, and CivicEagle to produce a great lobbyist software platform.\" class=\"wp-image-1415\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>We are excited to announce the release of an exciting new feature on <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a> that will change the way you recognize legislative changes. Beginning today, you will be able to compare bill text for legislation across different bienniums at the click of a button.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>It&#8217;s common for bills to be introduced in one congressional session, only to resurface with modifications in a later session. Occasionally, these changes, no matter how subtle, can have a significant impact on the bill&#8217;s content and implications. With this enhancement to our <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-lobbying-teams#bill-compare\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">bill comparison<\/a> feature, you can easily spot these differences and take appropriate action.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Whether you&#8217;re <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-representatives-and-staffers\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">in the legislature<\/a>, <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-lobbying-teams\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">a seasoned lobbyist or analyst<\/a>, this feature will be invaluable in your day-to-day work.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Check out these blog posts to learn more about our bill comparison features:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"wp-block-list\">\n<li><a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/introducing-related-bills\/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Introducing &#8220;Related Bills&#8221;<\/a><\/li>\n\n\n\n<li><a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/compare-bill-amendments\/\">Compare Amendment Texts<\/a><\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p>If you&#8217;re already a part of the OurGov community, we encourage you to dive into this new feature right away and experience the benefits firsthand. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Conversely, if you haven&#8217;t joined us yet, now is the perfect time to <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">sign up<\/a> or <a href=\"https:\/\/calendly.com\/our-gov\/30min?month=2022-11\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">schedule a demo<\/a>. Our suite of powerful tools and constant innovation make OurGov the go-to platform for anyone passionate about staying informed and making a difference.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Don&#8217;t miss out on this opportunity to stay ahead of legislative changes. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Visit <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/blog\/\">our blog<\/a> to learn more about our recent features and their impact on government affairs professionals. Your Lobbying Hours to the Ethics Commission"},"content":{"rendered":"\n<p>Import your lobbying hours with <a href=\"https:\/\/chrome.google.com\/webstore\/detail\/ourgov-hours-importer\/jjbiklejgjbellhmiofebjjdohkjjihm\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">our new plugin<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<iframe loading=\"lazy\" width=\"560\" height=\"315\" src=\"https:\/\/www.youtube.com\/embed\/5zBLKWuXOVY\" title=\"YouTube video player\" frameborder=\"0\" allow=\"accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share\" allowfullscreen=\"\"><\/iframe>\n\n\n\n<p>Picture this: every six months, you sit with your computer and calendar. You add up the time spent on behalf of each and every principal you represent and painstakingly aggregate the time on each date to be logged with the Eye on Lobbying site.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>This might take you <em>days<\/em> to perform. Days!<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>We&#8217;re proud to announce a new solution for lobbyists: <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov<\/a>&#8216;s <a href=\"https:\/\/chrome.google.com\/webstore\/detail\/ourgov-hours-logger\/jjbiklejgjbellhmiofebjjdohkjjihm\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Hours Importer<\/a>. This extension works with our <a href=\"https:\/\/docs.ourgov.app\/use-cases\/for-lobbying-teams\/tracking-your-hours\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">hours logging functionality<\/a>, <a href=\"https:\/\/getourgov.com\/log-your-hours-in-ourgov\/\">previously announced here<\/a> and enables you to import your lobbying hours into the <a href=\"https:\/\/lobbying.wi.gov\/Home\/Welcome\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">Eye On Lobbying<\/a> site.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>The process of copying your hours spent lobbying into a web form can be tedious, time-consuming and nerve-racking. Every lobbyist is required to register their time spent lobbying with the Wisconsin Ethics Commission, which is done via the state&#8217;s website, <a href=\"https:\/\/lobbying.wi.gov\/\">https:\/\/lobbying.wi.gov<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>We&#8217;ve developed a new browser plugin that seamlessly integrates with the state&#8217;s website in order to make your life easier. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<h2 class=\"wp-block-heading\">How Importing Your Hours Works<\/h2>\n\n\n\n<p>Take a look at the Hours Logging page within OurGov:<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/1_2023-05-18-Hours-Logging-Plugin-1024x640.png\" alt=\"Import your lobbying hours from the OurGov application to the Eye On Lobbying site.\" class=\"wp-image-1393\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>This is where all of your time lives and is the general source of truth for your time logging data. When you navigate to the Eye on Lobbying page, the data uploaded into the Ethics Commission fields is pulled from this data.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image size-large\"><img decoding=\"async\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/OurGov-Hours-Importer-1.gif\" alt=\"OurGov's Hours Importer tool allows quickly import your lobbying hours to the Eye On Lobbying Site.\"\/><\/figure>\n\n\n\n<p>The <strong>Hours Importer<\/strong> saves valuable time by allowing you to quickly import your lobbying hours from our website to the Ethics Commission&#8217;s site, eliminating the need to duplicate manual data entry.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>Note that you <em>still <\/em>must click the &#8216;Save Changes&#8217; button yourself, and that OurGov will <em>never <\/em>file or certify time on your behalf. <\/p>\n\n\n\n<p><a href=\"https:\/\/chrome.google.com\/webstore\/detail\/ourgov-hours-logger\/jjbiklejgjbellhmiofebjjdohkjjihm\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">OurGov&#8217;s Hours Importer<\/a> puts an end to the data entry parts of your job allowing you to enjoy time saved and peace of mind &#x1f9e0;&#x1f60c;. The extension is a must-have for any Wisconsin lobbyist looking to streamline their workflow and save valuable time.<\/p>\n\n\n\n<p>If you want to focus more on the important aspects of lobbying and less on the tedious task of logging hours, <a href=\"https:\/\/ourgov.app\/Identity\/Account\/Register\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer noopener\">sign up<\/a> and start using our Hours Importer extension today!<\/p>\n\n\n\n<hr class=\"wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-dots\"\/>\n\n\n\n<p><\/p>\n\n\n\n<figure class=\"wp-block-image aligncenter size-medium is-style-rounded\"><img loading=\"lazy\" decoding=\"async\" width=\"300\" height=\"295\" src=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023-04-28-Hours-Importer-Blog-Image-300x295.png\" alt=\"OurGov's hours importer automatically copies your time into the Ethics Commission's website.\" class=\"wp-image-1353\" srcset=\"https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023-04-28-Hours-Importer-Blog-Image-300x295.png 300w, https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023-04-28-Hours-Importer-Blog-Image-1024x1008.png 1024w, https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023-04-28-Hours-Importer-Blog-Image-768x756.png 768w, https:\/\/www.old.taylorchasewhite.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023-04-28-Hours-Importer-Blog-Image.png 1125w\" sizes=\"auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px\" \/><figcaption class=\"wp-element-caption\">This July should be the last time you <em>ever <\/em>manually copy time over again.<\/figcaption><\/figure>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"<p>We&#8217;re proud to announce a new time-saving solution for Wisconsin lobbyists: OurGov&#8217;s Hours Importer extension.
